name: Breakfast Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat 5 eggs together with 1/4 cup milk. Set aside.
2. Press the contents of one tube of refrigerated Pillsbury crescent rolls into an iron skillet. Top with 1 cup precooked (frozen, if preferred) hash browns, 1 cup crumbled precooked breakfast sausage, and 1 cup shredded cheese (I prefer cheddar).
3. Optionally, add chopped onions, peppers, hot sauce, salsa, salt, freshly ground black pepper, and any other desired toppings.
4. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the pizza. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F to 400°F for about 30 minutes or until set. Check frequently to avoid burning. Serve immediately.
